215.reason: [Error: inputFileStream may be null if file not found, causing NullPointerException.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: inputFileStream may be null if file not found, causing NullPointerException.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  // inputFileStream may be null if FileNotFoundException occurred, leading to NullPointerException.

329.reason: Missing else branch to handle the division operator '/', causing '/' to be skipped entirely.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  Missing else branch to handle the division operator '/', causing '/' to be skipped entirely.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  Missing else branch to handle the division operator '/'. When '/' is not followed by '/' or '*', it should be recognized as a DIV token, but currently it is silently ignored.
